categories.name: Speed Converters
categories.description: Convert between network speed units — bits and bytes, per second.

tools.name: Mbps to Bytes Converter
tools.description: Convert megabits per second to Bytes/s, KB/s and MB/s — see the real download speed behind your internet plan.

tools.name: Bytes to Mbps Converter
tools.description: Convert Bytes/s, KB/s or MB/s into megabits per second, with decimal (SI) and binary (IEC) support.
